title: 2019 Women’s Weekend Squash Event
excerpt: The tournament of the year happened the weekend of February 1-3 at the ESC, when over 100 women from all over the province, took over the club for the 2019 edition of the Women’s Weekend Squash Event.   The tournament is the most  highly anticipated and highly attended tournament of the year for women squash players. … Read more
content:
The tournament of the year happened the weekend of February 1-3 at the ESC, when over 100 women from all over the province, took over the club for the 2019 edition of the Women’s Weekend Squash Event.   The tournament is the most  highly anticipated and highly attended tournament of the year for women squash players.

For next year’s tournament watch for a Pajama Party, cool souvenir, fabulous Wine & Cheese Party, Mexican Buffet…  and more!

Want to skip all the results & acknowledgements and go straight to the photos? Click Here.

Congratulations to the winners of all the divisions

Women Singles Squash Champions

Level 1.0 Singles: Jaime Delorme (World Health Sport Club)

Level 2.0 Singles: Julia Smith (Glen Allen Rec Centre)

Level 2.5 Singles: Carolyn Binns (Royal Glenora Club)

Level 3.0 Singles: Sharon Blackwell (Royal Glenora Club)

Level 4.0 Singles: Aya Okamoto (Edmonton Squash Club)

Level 4.5 Singles: Hayley Andruko (University of Alberta)

Level 5.0 Singles: Eva Ghai

Level 5.5 Singles: Natalie Barraclough (Glen Allen Rec Centre)

Level 6.0 Singles: Romina Rodriguez (Edmonton Squash Club)

Level 6.5 Singles: Tracy McFee

Level 7.0 Singles: Lesley Martell

Women Doubles Squash Champions

Level 1 Doubles: Allyson Kjenner/Julie Multamaki

Level 2 Doubles: Carly Morrison/Halle Singh

Level 3 Doubles: Sharon Blackwell/Stephanie McConnell

For full results, please visit Club Locker at https://clublocker.com/tournaments/10130?divisionId=287&offset=0

Thank you to the many organizers, sponsors, volunteers and staff that helped to make the event as successful as ever!
